title: Aporum equitans
taxonomy: Aporum equitans is classified within the Dendrobiinae subtribe of the Orchidaceae family. It belongs to the genus Aporum, which is a type of epiphytic orchid. More specifically, Aporum equitans falls under the family Orchidaceae, which is one of the largest and most diverse plant families in the world. This classification is based on its physical characteristics, growth habits, and genetic makeup. The exact classification of Aporum equitans is subject to ongoing research and updates in the field of botany.
